title: Immunocytochemistry and Confocal Imaging of iNeurons
author: Felix Kraus
materials: Incubate cells with secondary antibodies for 1 hour at room temperature.
Cells are now ready for imaging.
Camera: Hamamatsu ORCA-Fusion BT CMOS (16-bit acquisition).
Segmentation masks are filtered by area (100–10,000 pixels).

steps.title: Pre-warm 4% paraformaldehyde (PFA) in PBS to 37 °C
steps.instruction: Pre-warm 4% paraformaldehyde (PFA) in PBS to 37 °C.

steps.title: Prepare primary and secondary antibody dilutions in 3% BSA-PBS**
steps.instruction: Prepare primary and secondary antibody dilutions in 3% BSA-PBS**.

steps.title: Ensure that the confocal microscope and lasers are properly calibrated
steps.instruction: Ensure that the confocal microscope and lasers are properly calibrated.

steps.title: Remove culture medium from differentiated iNeurons
steps.instruction: Remove culture medium from differentiated iNeurons.

steps.title: Add 4% PFA in PBS (pre-warmed to 37 °C)
steps.instruction: Add 4% PFA in PBS (pre-warmed to 37 °C).

steps.title: Incubate cells for 30 minutes at 37 °C
steps.instruction: Incubate cells for 30 minutes at 37 °C.

steps.title: Remove PFA and rinse cells once with PBS
steps.instruction: Remove PFA and rinse cells once with PBS.

steps.title: Incubate cells in 0
steps.instruction: Incubate cells in 0.5% Triton X-100 in PBS for 15 minutes at room temperature.

steps.title: Wash cells three times with PBST (0
steps.instruction: Wash cells three times with PBST (0.02% Tween-20 in PBS).

steps.title: Incubate cells in 3% BSA in...
steps.instruction: Incubate cells in 3% BSA in PBS for 10 minutes at room temperature.

steps.title: Wash cells three times with PBST
steps.instruction: Wash cells three times with PBST.

steps.title: Add antibody solution to cells
steps.instruction: Add antibody solution to cells.

steps.title: Incubate for 3 hours at room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate for 3 hours at room temperature.

steps.title: Wash cells three times with PBST
steps.instruction: Wash cells three times with PBST.

steps.title: Add Hoechst 33342 (1:10,000 in PBST)
steps.instruction: Add Hoechst 33342 (1:10,000 in PBST).

steps.title: Incubate for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Wash cells three times with PBST
steps.instruction: Wash cells three times with PBST.

steps.title: Images are acquired at room temperature...
steps.instruction: Images are acquired at room temperature using a Yokogawa CSU-W1 spinning disk confocal system mounted on a Nikon Eclipse Ti2-E microscope.

steps.title: Lasers are applied sequentially using a...
steps.instruction: Lasers are applied sequentially using a Nikon LUN-F XL laser combiner.

steps.title: Time-lapse calcium imaging datasets are analyzed...
steps.instruction: Time-lapse calcium imaging datasets are analyzed using a custom Python pipeline_.

steps.title: ND2 stacks are read using the nd2 Python package_
steps.instruction: ND2 stacks are read using the nd2 Python package_.

steps.title: Segmentation is performed using CellposeSAM with...
steps.instruction: Segmentation is performed using CellposeSAM with a pretrained model optimized for neuronal soma.

steps.title: Synaptic puncta from markers such as...
steps.instruction: Synaptic puncta from markers such as Synaptophysin (SYP) and Bassoon (BSN) are quantified using a custom Python pipeline_.

steps.title: Object-level colocalization analysis is performed between SYP and Bassoon puncta
steps.instruction: Object-level colocalization analysis is performed between SYP and Bassoon puncta.

steps.title: Cleaned processed images
steps.instruction: Cleaned processed images

steps.title: Downstream statistical analysis and visualization are performed in R_
steps.instruction: Downstream statistical analysis and visualization are performed in R_.

steps.title: Perform gentle buffer exchanges
steps.instruction: Perform gentle buffer exchanges

description: Background subtraction and segmentation detect synaptic puncta. High background
